name: @portfoliocraft/renderers
description: Markdown, JSON Resume, PDF, and SVG renderers for PortfolioCraft.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && node -e "import('node:fs/promises').then(async fs => { const { cpSync } = await import('node:fs'); cpSync('src/templates', 'dist/templates', { recursive: true }); })"
